## Summary

- What changed?

## Why

- Why is this change needed?

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test` if touched and available
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` if touched and available

## Memory updates

- [ ] Updated `TODO.md` if scope or next steps changed
- [ ] Updated `DECISIONS.md` for non-trivial tradeoffs
- [ ] Updated `ENV.md` or `.env.example` if setup changed
- [ ] Appended `.ai/session-log.md`
- [ ] Reviewed `CommonMistakes.global.md` and `CommonMistakes.project.md`
